caption: In an outdoor rural setting with a dirt path and lush green tropical foliage, including banana trees, a woman in a lime green dress interacts with a young child. The woman stands facing the child, extending her arm to gently touch or pat the child's face. The child, wearing a tan-colored shirt and pants, stands still and looks toward her. In the background, another person in a light-colored shirt and dark trousers walks away along the path. Throughout the sequence, the woman maintains her posture and continues her interaction with the child, while the person in the distance moves further away. No on-screen text, logos, or equipment are visible. The lighting is bright and natural, suggesting a daytime scene in a village environment.
